compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect onboarding skill restructuring
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update onboarding-related documentation to reflect the new pre-flight phase, confidence context object, document folder feature, batch script structure, and hook sequencing changes introduced by this epic.

**Why**: CLAUDE.md quick reference, KNOWN-ISSUES.md, and onboarding skill cross-references in other skills would become stale after the epic completes. Future agents need accurate awareness of the updated onboarding flow.

**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md onboarding quick reference (if changed), KNOWN-ISSUES.md (resolved issues from this epic), onboarding skill cross-references in other skills, docs/adr/ if architectural decisions were made
- OUT: creating new documentation files; changes to the skill files themselves (covered by S1-S5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately reflects any command or reference changes introduced by the onboarding epic
  <- Satisfies: all epic success criteria (documentation accuracy)
- When this story is complete, KNOWN-ISSUES.md entries for issues resolved by this epic are marked as resolved and updated
  <- Satisfies: all epic success criteria (documentation accuracy)

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions when writing documentation updates

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Escalate when blocked — proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test
